perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a living room where a woman in a beige outfit approaches another woman sitting on a white sofa holding a phone; they look concerned and then surprised. (2) They move to the kitchen where the sink is full of dirty dishes with sauce stains. The beige-clad woman produces a bottle of dish soap. (3) Close-up shots show the soap being poured onto a brown sponge and used to scrub a white plate, creating thick white foam. (4) The woman in black is then shown washing fruits (apple, peppers) in a bowl. (5) Both women stand in the kitchen doorway, one holding a clean plate and the other holding the soap bottle, smiling and gesturing. (6) A gift box containing three different spray bottles is presented to the camera. The woman in black takes the box and walks away, leaving the beige-clad woman at the sink.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, acoustic guitar-driven background music starts immediately. Two female voices are heard in a conversational, slightly exaggerated tone, expressing surprise and concern. (2) As the scene shifts to the kitchen, the vocals transition into a clearer, instructional narration style, though the original speakers continue to chime in. (3) Sound effects of running water and the squeaky sound of a clean plate being rubbed are audible during the demonstration. (4) The music remains consistent in tempo and volume throughout, providing an energetic backdrop to the continuous dialogue and product description. (5) The video ends with a humorous exchange and a short musical sting.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles translate the dialogue throughout the video. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: Large red exclamation marks and '!?' appear early on to denote surprise. (3) Hook Text: '骨董級碗盤' (Antique-level dishes) appears over the sink. (4) Brand Text: 'Goodies & Co. 二合一蔬果碗盤洗潔劑' (2-in-1 Fruit & Vegetable Dish Soap) is displayed prominently. (5) Feature Text: '天然的咖啡渣製作而成' (Made from natural coffee grounds) and '中性植萃配方' (Neutral plant-based formula) highlight product benefits. (6) Closing Text: '愛上洗碗就靠它' (Fall in love with washing dishes because of it).

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows a 'Problem -> Solution -> Benefit -> Closing' flow, starting with the shock of dirty dishes and moving through a product demonstration to a final recommendation.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators interact throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has black hair with bangs, wearing a black sweatshirt and beige pants; the other has her hair in a bun, wearing a beige lounge set.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern apartment interior featuring a white leather sofa, a minimalist kitchen with white marble-patterned walls, a stainless steel sink, and light wood cabinetry.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even indoor lighting, likely studio-assisted to ensure clarity.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional advertisement for 'Goodies & Co.' cleaning products. It uses a relatable domestic scenario (dirty dishes) to introduce a solution, demonstrates the product's effectiveness and safety (plant-based, gentle on hands), and concludes by showcasing a broader product line to encourage purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators explicitly demonstrate the product, discuss its specific features and ingredients, and hold the branded packaging toward the camera throughout the video.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy interaction between female friends, variety-show style large text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively blends 'infotainment' by using a lighthearted narrative to deliver detailed product information, typical of modern social media influencer marketing.
